import_story.title: Arcs and Canon Gate Check
import_story.description: Plan 09 live arc lifecycle, bridge, and canon validation story.

steps.eval: await globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.applyExtractionAudit({ id:'arc-open', createdAt:new Date().toISOString(), priority:0, reason:'manual', contractHash:'h', scope:[], window:{from:0,to:1}, prompt:'p', rawResponse:'r', acceptedDeltas:[], rejected:[] }, [], [], [ { kind:'open', text:'The identity of the granary arsonist is still unknown to all.' }, { kind:'open', text:'Mira swore revenge on the traveling merchant and has not yet acted.' } ]); return globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getSnapshot().memory.arcs;

await globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.applyExtractionAudit({ id:'arc-resolve', createdAt:new Date().toISOString(), priority:0, reason:'manual', contractHash:'h', scope:[], window:{from:2,to:3}, prompt:'p', rawResponse:'r', acceptedDeltas:[], rejected:[] }, [], [], [ { kind:'resolved', text:'The granary arsonist is now known to all.' } ]); await globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.commitBoundary(); return { arcs: globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getSnapshot().memory.arcs, cp: globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getEngineState().activeCheckpointId, bb: globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getEngineState().blackboard.values };

globalThis.storyOrchestratorDebugArcSummaryResponse = 'The granary arsonist was unmasked as the steward, closing the mystery that had haunted the village.'; globalThis.storyOrchestratorDebugCanonResponse = 'WHAT HAS HAPPENED: The granary mystery was solved when the steward was exposed.\nCURRENT STATE: Mira still seeks revenge on the merchant.\nESTABLISHED FACTS: The village trusts the reeve again.'; const arc = globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getArcs().find((a) => a.status === 'resolved'); await globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.runArcSummaryPass([arc.id]); return { arcs: globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getArcs(), canon: globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getSnapshot().memory.canon };

const c = globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getCanon(); if (!c.includes('granary mystery was solved')) throw new Error('getCanon() did not return derived canon: ' + c); const m = SillyTavern.getContext().substituteParams('{{story_canon}}'); if (!m.includes('granary mystery was solved')) throw new Error('story_canon macro did not resolve to derived canon: ' + m); return true;
